.file-embed.background: rgb(43, 33, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(43, 33, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(48, 36, 61) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(48, 36, 61) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(48, 36, 61) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgb(89, 58, 120) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(89, 58, 120) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(48, 36, 61) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(89, 58, 120) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(43, 33, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(43, 33, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(223, 118, 155, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(28, 18, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(43, 33, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input.prompt-input[type=\"text\"].background: rgb(41, 29, 53) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(41, 29, 53) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"text\"].background: rgb(41, 29, 53) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(43, 33, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(153, 142, 241, 0.3) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(43, 33, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(43, 33, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
